en: Hi, Lulu! This is Xiao Ya. Xiao Ya, this is Lulu.
zh: 你好，露露！这是小雅。小雅，这是露露。

en: Nice to meet you, Xiao Ya.
zh: 很高兴认识你，小雅。

en: Nice to meet you, too. Where are you from?
zh: 我也很高兴认识你。你来自哪里？

en: I’m from Beijing. And you?
zh: 我来自北京。你呢？

en: I’m in Class 6, Grade 7. Which class are you in?
zh: 我在七年级六班。你在哪个班？

en: I’m in Class 6, Grade 7, too. We are classmates.
zh: 我也在七年级六班。我们是同学。

en: I’m twelve. How old are you?
zh: 我十二岁。你多大了？

en: I’m thirteen years old. See you.
zh: 我十三岁。再见。

en: I’m friendly and I like science.
zh: 我很友好，我喜欢科学。

en: I am thirteen years old.
zh: 我十三岁了。

en: I’m in Class Three, Grade Seven.
zh: 我在七年级三班。

en: Friends play together and help each other.
zh: 朋友们一起玩耍并互相帮助。

en: This is my friend, Jim White.
zh: 这是我的朋友，吉姆·怀特。

en: He is 13 years old.
zh: 他13岁了。

en: He is tall and strong.
zh: 他又高又壮。

en: We often play football together.
zh: 我们经常一起踢足球。

en: In English, the first name is given name, and the last name is family name.
zh: 在英语中，第一个名字是名，最后一个名字是姓。

en: But in Chinese, family name comes first.
zh: 但在中文中，姓在前。

en: Hi, I’m Kangkang. I’m from Beijing. I’m in Class Six, Grade Seven. I’m twelve. I like science. Here are my friends.
zh: 嗨，我是康康。我来自北京。我在七年级六班。我十二岁。我喜欢科学。这是我的朋友们。

en: Xiao Ya is from Tianjin. She’s in Class Six, too. She is kind and cute. She likes singing and playing the guitar.
zh: 小雅来自天津。她也在六班。她善良又可爱。她喜欢唱歌和弹吉他。

en: Li Xiang is from Beijing, too. He is in Class Three, Grade Seven. He is tall and strong. He likes hiking.
zh: 李响也来自北京。他在七年级三班。他又高又壮。他喜欢徒步旅行。

en: Lingling is my classmate. She’s friendly and quiet. She likes reading.
zh: 玲玲是我的同学。她友好又安静。她喜欢阅读。

en: We are all new here, and we are very happy to meet each other at the new school!
zh: 我们都是新来的，我们很高兴在新学校相遇！

en: You are in Class 6.
zh: 你在6班。

en: It is a cute dog and has two big ears.
zh: 它是一只可爱的狗，有两只大耳朵。

en: He is 12 years old.
zh: 他12岁。

en: This is my friend, Sarah Hill.
zh: 这是我的朋友，莎拉·希尔。

en: Sarah has a brother, Tom Hill.
zh: 莎拉有一个兄弟，汤姆·希尔。

en: He likes singing and dancing.
zh: 他喜欢唱歌和跳舞。

en: Hello! My name is Li Mei. What’s your name?
zh: 你好！我的名字是李梅。你叫什么名字？

en: Hi! I am Li Xiang. Are you in Class Three?
zh: 嗨！我是李响。你在三班吗？

en: Yes, I am. We are classmates.
zh: 是的，我是。我们是同学。

en: Is that boy our classmate, too?
zh: 那个男孩也是我们的同学吗？

en: No, he isn’t. He is in Class One.
zh: 不，他不是。他在一班。

en: Hi, everyone! My name is Lingling.
zh: 大家好！我叫玲玲。

en: I have a good friend.
zh: 我有一个好朋友。

en: Her name is Xiao Ya.
zh: 她的名字是小雅。

en: I’m in Class Six, Grade Seven.
zh: 我在七年级六班。

en: Xiao Ya is from Tianjin.
zh: 小雅来自天津。

en: She is a beautiful and lovely girl.
zh: 她是一个漂亮又可爱的女孩。

en: I like drawing pictures and reading books.
zh: 我喜欢画画和看书。

en: Xiao Ya likes singing and listening to music.
zh: 小雅喜欢唱歌和听音乐。

en: We also do many things together, such as swimming and running.
zh: 我们还一起做很多事情，比如游泳和跑步。

en: Xiao Ya is a great friend!
zh: 小雅是一个很棒的朋友！

en: I enjoy the time with her.
zh: 我很享受和她在一起的时光。

en: My name is Yangyang. I’m from Shijiazhuang.
zh: 我叫阳阳。我来自石家庄。

en: Lingling is my best friend at school.
zh: 玲玲是我在学校最好的朋友。

en: Lingling is a quiet girl.
zh: 玲玲是个安静的女孩。

en: She doesn’t talk much, but she likes to help others.
zh: 她话不多，但她喜欢帮助别人。

en: She is really friendly and kind.
zh: 她真的很友善和善良。

en: I’m happy to be friends with her and I enjoy the time with her.
zh: 我很高兴能和她做朋友，并且我很享受和她在一起的时光。

en: My name is Kangkang. I’m a student. I am in Class 6, Grade 7.
zh: 我的名字是康康。我是一名学生。我在七年级六班。

en: This man is my father. He always wears a tie. He is a doctor.
zh: 这个男人是我的父亲。他总是打领带。他是一名医生。

en: My mother is a teacher. She likes wearing qipao.
zh: 我的母亲是一名教师。她喜欢穿旗袍。

en: My uncle is in a white shirt. He is a worker.
zh: 我的叔叔穿着白衬衫。他是一名工人。

en: That woman in a blue dress is my aunt. She is a nurse.
zh: 那个穿蓝色连衣裙的女人是我的阿姨。她是一名护士。

en: The tall girl in yellow is my cousin. She’s my uncle’s child.
zh: 穿黄色衣服的高个女孩是我的表妹。她是我叔叔的孩子。

en: Xuanxuan is my little sister. She has a pink toy rabbit.
zh: 萱萱是我的小妹妹。她有一个粉色的玩具兔子。

en: No, she isn’t. She is my cousin.
zh: 不，她不是。她是我的表妹。

en: Is this tall girl your sister?
zh: 这个高个女孩是你的姐姐吗？

en: Is this a photo of your family?
zh: 这是你家的照片吗？

en: What does your father do?
zh: 你父亲是做什么的？

en: He works in our school.
zh: 他在我们学校工作。

en: What does your mother do?
zh: 你母亲是做什么的？

en: She is a worker in a big factory.
zh: 她是一家大工厂的工人。

en: Your little sister is so cute and pretty.
zh: 你的小妹妹真可爱漂亮。

en: She is only four years old.
zh: 她只有四岁。

en: A writer needs to think of some ideas first, and then organize them in a good way.
zh: 作家需要先思考一些想法，然后用好的方式组织它们。

en: Maria is from a big family.
zh: 玛丽亚来自一个大家庭。

en: She lives with her grandparents, parents, uncles, aunts, brothers, sisters and cousins.
zh: 她和她的祖父母、父母、叔叔、阿姨、兄弟、姐妹和堂兄弟姐妹住在一起。

en: Li Xiang’s family is small.
zh: 李响的家庭很小。

en: There are three people in his family: his parents and him.
zh: 他家有三口人：他的父母和他。

en: Grandparents, parents and children live together.
zh: 祖父母、父母和孩子住在一起。

en: The parents live with their children.
zh: 父母和他们的孩子住在一起。

en: My mother is a teacher, and my father is a doctor.
zh: 我的妈妈是一名老师，我的爸爸是一名医生。

en: They are very busy most of the time.
zh: 他们大部分时间都很忙。

en: But after work, we do many things together.
zh: 但是下班后，我们一起做很多事情。

en: My grandparents don’t live with us.
zh: 我的（外）祖父母不和我们住在一起。

en: We often visit them on weekends and have dinner together.
zh: 我们经常在周末去看望他们，并一起吃晚饭。

en: We all do something for dinner.
zh: 我们都会为晚餐做些什么。

en: My parents cook the food.
zh: 我的父母做饭。

en: My sister helps our grandparents set the table and I clean up with my father after dinner.
zh: 我的姐姐/妹妹帮助我们的（外）祖父母摆桌子，我在饭后和我的爸爸一起打扫。

en: I love my family, and I enjoy my family time.
zh: 我爱我的家人，并且我享受我的家庭时光。

en: Hello, my name is Li Xiang.
zh: 你好，我叫李响。

en: Let me tell you about my family.
zh: 让我告诉你关于我的家庭。

en: There are three people in my family.
zh: 我家有三口人。

en: They are my father, my mother and I.
zh: 他们是我的父亲、母亲和我。

en: My father is a doctor.
zh: 我的父亲是一名医生。

en: My mother is a nurse.
zh: 我的母亲是一名护士。

en: My family do many things together.
zh: 我的家人一起做很多事情。

en: We often do sports in the afternoon, such as running and swimming.
zh: 我们经常在下午做运动，比如跑步和游泳。

en: Sometimes, we watch films at home.
zh: 有时，我们在家看电影。

en: On weekends, we often visit my grandparents.
zh: 在周末，我们经常拜访我的祖父母。

en: My name is Lin Hua.
zh: 我的名字是林华。

en: I am twelve years old.
zh: 我十二岁。

en: I’m a student in Grade Seven.
zh: 我是一名七年级的学生。

en: He works in a hospital.
zh: 他在一家医院工作。

en: My mother is a teacher.
zh: 我的母亲是一名教师。

en: She teaches in a high school.
zh: 她在一所高中教书。

en: I have a sister, Yaoyao.
zh: 我有一个妹妹，叫瑶瑶。

en: She is six years old.
zh: 她六岁。

en: She likes playing with Kitty.
zh: 她喜欢和Kitty玩耍。

en: Kitty is a cute cat.
zh: Kitty是一只可爱的猫。

en: My grandparents live with us.
zh: 我的祖父母和我们住在一起。

en: They help a lot in looking after the family.
zh: 他们在照顾家庭方面提供了很多帮助。

en: Xiao Ya: Hi, Kangkang. How do you usually come to school?
zh: 小雅：嗨，康康。你通常怎么来学校？

en: Kangkang: My home is not very far, so I usually come here on foot, sometimes by bike.
zh: 康康：我家不是很远，所以我通常步行来学校，有时骑自行车。

en: How about you, Xiao Ya?
zh: 你呢，小雅？

en: Xiao Ya: I live far from school.
zh: 小雅：我住得离学校很远。

en: I never come to school on foot.
zh: 我从不步行来学校。

en: I often take the underground.
zh: 我经常乘地铁。

en: Lulu: I seldom take the underground.
zh: 露露：我很少乘地铁。

en: There are no underground stops near my home.
zh: 我家附近没有地铁站。

en: I always come to school by bus.
zh: 我总是乘公共汽车来学校。

en: Kangkang: What’s the time now?
zh: 康康：现在几点了？

en: We have a big school library.
zh: 我们有一个很大的学校图书馆。

en: It is a new building with two floors.
zh: 它是一栋有两层楼的新建筑。

en: There are a lot of books in it.
zh: 里面有很多书。

en: My school is very beautiful.
zh: 我的学校非常漂亮。

en: There is a beautiful teaching building.
zh: 有一座漂亮的教学楼。

en: The playground is very big.
zh: 操场非常大。

en: Next to the playground, there is a small garden.
zh: 操场旁边有一个小花园。

en: There are many beautiful flowers in it.
zh: 里面有许多美丽的花。

en: The main idea is what the text is all about.
zh: 主要思想是文本的全部内容。

en: Details are used to support or tell more about the main idea.
zh: 细节用于支持或进一步说明主要思想。

en: He goes to the swimming club at 4:30 every Tuesday afternoon.
zh: 他每周二下午4:30去游泳俱乐部。

en: He plays water games with his friends at the club.
zh: 他在俱乐部和朋友们玩水上游戏。

en: Every Friday, she goes to the art club to draw pictures there.
zh: 每周五，她去艺术俱乐部在那里画画。

en: When you are reading, you can go through the text quickly and only search for the information you need.
zh: 当你阅读时，你可以快速浏览文本，只搜索你需要的信息。

en: I’m Kangkang and I study at a middle school in Beijing.
zh: 我是康康，我在北京的一所中学学习。

en: Our school life is fun and colorful.
zh: 我们的学校生活有趣且丰富多彩。

en: On the morning of every Monday, we raise the national flag.
zh: 每周一的早晨，我们升国旗。

en: We start the first class at 8:00 a.m. every day.
zh: 我们每天早上8点开始第一节课。

en: We study Chinese, English, math, science and many other subjects.
zh: 我们学习语文、英语、数学、科学和许多其他科目。

en: My favorite class is PE.
zh: 我最喜欢的课是体育课。

en: Every afternoon, we have one PE class on the playground.
zh: 每天下午，我们在操场上有一节体育课。

en: There are many student clubs in our school.
zh: 我们学校有很多学生俱乐部。

en: We can make friends with other students there.
zh: 我们可以在那里和其他学生交朋友。

en: We have different activities in the clubs after school.
zh: 放学后，我们在俱乐部里有不同的活动。

en: I enjoy singing and playing the guitar in the music club.
zh: 我喜欢在音乐俱乐部里唱歌和弹吉他。

en: I really love going to school.
zh: 我真的很喜欢上学。

en: I am a middle school student, and my school life is colorful.
zh: 我是一名中学生，我的学校生活丰富多彩。

en: We usually start our day at 8:00 a.m., and our classes end at 4:00 p.m.
zh: 我们通常在早上8点开始一天的学习，下午4点下课。

en: We learn many different subjects like Chinese, math, science, history and English.
zh: 我们学习许多不同的科目，如语文、数学、科学、历史和英语。

en: After school, we play games.
zh: 放学后，我们玩游戏。

en: There are also many interesting after-school activities.
zh: 还有许多有趣的课后活动。

en: We can join the clubs, play sports or go to the library.
zh: 我们可以参加社团、做运动或去图书馆。

en: I really love my school life!
zh: 我真的很喜欢我的学校生活！

en: Our school is in Greenland city.
zh: 我们的学校位于格林兰市。

en: It has a history of 32 years.
zh: 它有32年的历史。

en: There are 3 grades, 18 classes, and about 40 teachers in our school now.
zh: 我们学校现在有3个年级，18个班级，和大约40名教师。

en: Students learn English, math, Chinese, science, PE and some other subjects.
zh: 学生们学习英语、数学、语文、科学、体育和其他一些科目。

en: And there are lots of clubs in our school, such as art club, sports club and music club!
zh: 而且我们学校有很多俱乐部，比如艺术俱乐部、体育俱乐部和音乐俱乐部！

en: Students can learn a lot and have great fun here.
zh: 学生们可以在这里学到很多东西并且玩得很开心。

en: Welcome to find out more about our school!
zh: 欢迎了解更多关于我们学校的信息！

en: Do You Want to Make a Film?
zh: 你想制作电影吗？

en: Meet Mr. Zhang at the Science Club.
zh: 在科学俱乐部见张先生。

en: Time: 1:00 p.m. -- 3:00 p.m. every Friday
zh: 时间：每周五下午1:00至3:00

en: Come and Meet the Writers!
zh: 来见见作家们！

en: Time: 1:00 p.m. on Wednesday
zh: 时间：星期三下午1:00

en: Hi, this is Wang Junfeng.
zh: 嗨，我是王俊峰。

en: Hi, Wang Junfeng. What are you doing?
zh: 嗨，王俊峰。你在做什么？

en: I’m putting on my football shoes. I want to play football.
zh: 我正在穿我的足球鞋。我想踢足球。

en: Do you want to come and play with me?
zh: 你想来和我一起玩吗？

en: Sorry, I’m working on my homework. And I’m not really good at playing football.
zh: 抱歉，我正在做作业。而且我踢足球真的不太擅长。

en: Why not join the football club? You can learn to play it.
zh: 为什么不加入足球俱乐部呢？你可以学习踢足球。

en: Great! Are you in the club?
zh: 太好了！你在俱乐部吗？

en: Yes. I love football and I can play it very well.
zh: 是的。我热爱足球，而且我踢得很好。

en: Good for you. I hope I can play football well like you.
zh: 真为你高兴。我希望我能像你一样踢好足球。

en: Many Americans love playing baseball.
zh: 许多美国人喜欢打棒球。

en: They play it all year long.
zh: 他们全年都打棒球。

en: On sunny or cloudy days, they play it outdoors.
zh: 在晴天或阴天，他们在户外打棒球。

en: On rainy days, they play it indoors.
zh: 在雨天，他们在室内打棒球。

en: The setting is when and where a story or an event takes place.
zh: 背景是故事或事件发生的时间和地点。

en: It usually includes time, place, weather, etc.
zh: 它通常包括时间、地点、天气等。

en: It’s sunny in the morning.
zh: 早上天气晴朗。

en: The girl is playing Chinese yo-yo in the park.
zh: 女孩正在公园里玩空竹。

en: Exercise is good for your health, but how do you do it?
zh: 锻炼对你的健康有益，但你该如何进行呢？

en: Always wear the right shoes and sports clothes.
zh: 总是穿合适的鞋子和运动服。

en: Sometimes, you need to take some water with you.
zh: 有时，你需要随身带一些水。

en: For most sports, it’s important to warm up before exercise.
zh: 对于大多数运动来说，在锻炼前热身是很重要的。

en: Don’t do sports too much in very hot or cold weather.
zh: 不要在非常炎热或寒冷的天气里做太多运动。

en: He often plays football with his classmates after class on Friday.
zh: 他经常在周五下课后和同学们一起踢足球。

en: Now it’s sunny out there.
zh: 现在外面阳光明媚。

en: All the boys are having fun on the playground.
zh: 所有的男孩都在操场上玩得很开心。

en: Wang Junfeng’s team is not playing very well at the start.
zh: 王俊峰的队伍一开始踢得不是很好。

en: But Wang Junfeng doesn’t give up.
zh: 但王俊峰没有放弃。

en: He keeps running and passing the ball.
zh: 他不停地奔跑和传球。

en: In the end, they win the game two to one.
zh: 最后，他们以二比一赢得了比赛。

en: His PE teacher, Mr. Li, is watching the game.
zh: 他的体育老师李先生正在观看比赛。

en: He hopes Wang Junfeng can play for the school football team, and that is Wang Junfeng’s wish, too.
zh: 他希望王俊峰能为校足球队效力，这也是王俊峰的愿望。

en: Now he is feeling like a big football star!
zh: 现在他感觉自己像个大足球明星！

en: She is riding a bike.
zh: 她正在骑自行车。

en: She isn't taking a bus.
zh: 她没有乘公共汽车。

en: There are many people in the park.
zh: 公园里有很多人。

en: The woman in pink is having a picnic with her friend.
zh: 穿粉色衣服的女人正在和她的朋友野餐。

en: Look at the woman in red.
zh: 看那个穿红色衣服的女人。

en: She is feeding a bird.
zh: 她正在喂鸟。

en: My aunt and uncle are over there.
zh: 我的姑姑和姑父在那边。

en: Mr. White is walking the dog by the lake.
zh: 怀特先生正在湖边遛狗。

en: The girl in yellow is his sister.
zh: 穿黄色衣服的女孩是他的妹妹。

en: I am riding a bike.
zh: 我正在骑自行车。

en: You are dancing in the rain.
zh: 你正在雨中跳舞。

en: My favorite sport is skiing.
zh: 我最喜欢的运动是滑雪。

en: Skiing has a long history in my hometown, Altay.
zh: 滑雪在我的家乡阿勒泰有着悠久的历史。

en: People travel here to ski in winter.
zh: 人们冬天来这里滑雪。

en: I often ski with my friends in the beautiful snow season.
zh: 我经常在美丽的雪季和朋友们一起滑雪。

en: My friends and I are skiing in the mountains.
zh: 我和朋友们正在山上滑雪。

en: I’m good at making turns.
zh: 我擅长转弯。

en: And my friends move very fast.
zh: 我的朋友们移动得很快。

en: I also enjoy watching skiing games on TV.
zh: 我也喜欢在电视上看滑雪比赛。

en: I can learn a lot from it.
zh: 我可以从中学到很多。

en: In my school, we have a sports day every spring and autumn.
zh: 在我的学校，我们每年春天和秋天都有一个运动日。

en: Today is our autumn sports day.
zh: 今天是我们的秋季运动日。

en: We are playing different sports on the playground.
zh: 我们正在操场上进行不同的运动。

en: Look, some students are playing basketball and ping-pong.
zh: 看，一些学生正在打篮球和乒乓球。

en: Some are running like wind.
zh: 一些人在像风一样奔跑。

en: Some others are having three-legged races as a team.
zh: 还有一些人正在以团队形式进行两人三足比赛。

en: Our parents are also here.
zh: 我们的父母也在这里。

en: Some of them are watching on the sides of the playground.
zh: 他们中的一些人在操场边观看。

en: Some are even doing sports with us!
zh: 有些人甚至和我们一起做运动！

en: I love our sports day!
zh: 我爱我们的运动日！

en: Deserts are very dry because it rains little.
zh: 沙漠非常干燥，因为很少下雨。

en: But it is not always hot in deserts.
zh: 但沙漠并不总是热的。

en: In some deserts, it is hot in summer but very cold in winter.
zh: 在一些沙漠中，夏天很热但冬天很冷。

en: Some animals can live in deserts and people can live there, too.
zh: 一些动物可以生活在沙漠中，人们也可以住在那里。

en: The houses often have small windows.
zh: 房屋通常有小窗户。

en: People usually live near the lakes in deserts.
zh: 人们通常住在沙漠中的湖泊附近。

en: Today, we are talking about deserts.
zh: 今天，我们要谈论沙漠。

en: Do you have any questions about deserts?
zh: 你们对沙漠有什么问题吗？

en: What’s the climate like in deserts?
zh: 沙漠的气候是什么样的？

en: It is usually dry, because there is little rain.
zh: 通常很干燥，因为很少下雨。

en: Is it hot in deserts?
zh: 沙漠里热吗？

en: It is hot in summer but very cold in winter.
zh: 夏天很热但冬天很冷。

en: Can animals and plants live in deserts?
zh: 动物和植物能生活在沙漠中吗？

en: Deserts are home to some animals and plants.
zh: 沙漠是一些动植物的家园。

en: Can people live in deserts, too?
zh: 人们也能住在沙漠里吗？

en: In deserts, most houses have small windows to keep out the sun and the wind.
zh: 在沙漠中，大多数房屋都有小窗户以遮挡阳光和风。

en: How do people get water in deserts?
zh: 人们在沙漠中如何获取水？

en: There are lakes in some deserts.
zh: 在一些沙漠中有湖泊。

en: People usually live near the lakes.
zh: 人们通常住在湖泊附近。

en: What are Miss Wang and her students talking about?
zh: 王老师和她的学生们在谈论什么？

en: Pandas live in the mountains of China.
zh: 熊猫生活在中国山区。

en: A panda has four legs and a short tail.
zh: 熊猫有四条腿和一条短尾巴。

en: Most of them are black and white.
zh: 它们大多数是黑白相间的。

en: Their favorite food is bamboo.
zh: 它们最喜欢的食物是竹子。

en: Brown bears live in the forests of North America.
zh: 棕熊生活在北美的森林里。

en: They are brown in color.
zh: 它们是棕色的。

en: They have four strong legs.
zh: 它们有四条强壮的腿。

en: They eat grass, fish and many other things.
zh: 它们吃草、鱼和许多其他东西。

en: Bats and birds can fly.
zh: 蝙蝠和鸟会飞。

en: Most bats are active at night and most birds are active in the day.
zh: 大多数蝙蝠在夜间活动，大多数鸟在白天活动。

en: To compare, tell what is similar here.
zh: 比较，就是说出相似之处。

en: To contrast, tell what is different here.
zh: 对比，就是说出不同之处。

en: To compare, we tell how things are similar.
zh: 比较，就是说出事物的相似之处。

en: To contrast, we tell how things are different.
zh: 对比，就是说出事物的不同之处。

en: Shunan Bamboo Forest is in Yibin, Sichuan.
zh: 蜀南竹海位于四川宜宾。

en: It is a sea of bamboos.
zh: 它是竹子的海洋。

en: There are about 400 different kinds of bamboos.
zh: 那里有大约400种不同的竹子。

en: In summer, the bamboos grow thickly, and the forest is all green.
zh: 夏天，竹子生长茂密，森林一片翠绿。

en: People can take the cable cars and have a good look at the beautiful forest.
zh: 人们可以乘坐缆车，好好欣赏美丽的森林。

en: There are lots of pine trees in Daxing’anling.
zh: 大兴安岭有许多松树。

en: They can grow very tall.
zh: 它们可以长得很高。

en: They bloom in May and June and the flowers are red.
zh: 它们在五月和六月开花，花是红色的。

en: Rainforests and deserts are two very different living places in nature.
zh: 雨林和沙漠是自然界中两种截然不同的生存场所。

en: In a rainforest, it is warm and wet, and it rains a lot.
zh: 在雨林中，气候温暖潮湿，降雨量很大。

en: You can find many kinds of plants and animals there.
zh: 在那里你可以找到许多种类的植物和动物。

en: Plants can grow very tall, and animals have plenty of food to eat.
zh: 植物可以长得很高，动物有充足的食物可吃。

en: The desert is hot and dry.
zh: 沙漠炎热干燥。

en: It rains very little there.
zh: 那里降雨很少。

en: There are also some kinds of plants in the desert, like cactuses.
zh: 沙漠中也有一些种类的植物，比如仙人掌。

en: The plants can keep water and grow.
zh: 这些植物能够储存水分并生长。

en: Only a few animals can live in the desert.
zh: 只有少数动物能在沙漠中生存。

en: They don’t have much to eat and many of them live on other small animals.
zh: 它们没有太多食物可吃，其中许多以其他小动物为生。

en: Rainforests and deserts are wonders of nature.
zh: 雨林和沙漠是自然界的奇观。

en: They are home to many animals and plants.
zh: 它们是许多动植物的家园。

en: There is an egg and a ball.
zh: 有一个鸡蛋和一个球。

en: The egg is small, but the ball is big.
zh: 鸡蛋很小，但球很大。

en: A man is looking at the pictures about nature.
zh: 一个男人正在看关于自然的图片。

en: A plant needs three things to grow: sun, earth and water.
zh: 植物需要三样东西来生长：阳光、土壤和水。

en: There are four seasons in a year.
zh: 一年有四个季节。

en: In spring, the weather is warm.
zh: 春天，天气很暖和。

en: Sometimes it is windy, so I can go to the park and fly a kite there.
zh: 有时会刮风，所以我可以去公园放风筝。

en: My favorite season is summer because I can wear nice dresses.
zh: 我最喜欢的季节是夏天，因为我可以穿漂亮的裙子。

en: I have an orange dress and all my friends like it.
zh: 我有一条橙色的裙子，我所有的朋友都喜欢它。

en: In autumn, I eat an apple every day.
zh: 在秋天，我每天吃一个苹果。

en: And in winter, I can make a snowman after it snows.
zh: 在冬天，下雪后我可以堆雪人。

en: Can pine trees grow very tall?
zh: 松树能长得很高吗？

en: But it can fly very high.
zh: 但它能飞得很高。

en: Plants and animals can live together in nature.
zh: 植物和动物可以在自然界中共同生活。

en: A bee can fly in flowers.
zh: 蜜蜂能在花丛中飞舞。

en: It can’t swim in the water.
zh: 它不能在水里游泳。

en: Sharks can swim in the water.
zh: 鲨鱼能在水里游泳。

en: They can’t fly in the sky.
zh: 它们不会在天空中飞。

en: Menglan is a panda in a zoo.
zh: 梦兰是动物园里的一只熊猫。

en: He can climb high in a tree.
zh: 他能爬到高高的树上。

en: He can play with his toys.
zh: 他可以玩他的玩具。

en: He can’t talk, but when people call his name, he can understand it.
zh: 他不会说话，但当人们叫他的名字时，他能理解。

en: It is great fun to watch him in the zoo.
zh: 在动物园里观看他非常有趣。

en: My cousin Lulu and I come from two different places in Yunnan, and Yunnan is our hometown.
zh: 我和表妹露露来自云南的两个不同地方，云南是我们的家乡。

en: It is in the south of Yunnan.
zh: 它位于云南的南部。

en: The climate is hot and there is a big rainforest here.
zh: 这里气候炎热，有一片大热带雨林。

en: Many wild animals like elephants and monkeys live in the forest.
zh: 许多野生动物，如大象和猴子，生活在森林里。

en: I often join in the activities to look after the wild animals.
zh: 我经常参加照顾野生动物的活动。

en: It is in the middle of Yunnan.
zh: 它位于云南的中部。

en: The climate in Kunming is warm.
zh: 昆明的气候温暖。

en: There are different kinds of plants in every season, and people all like to grow beautiful flowers at home.
zh: 每个季节都有不同种类的植物，人们都喜欢在家里种植美丽的花朵。

en: Welcome to visit our beautiful hometown!
zh: 欢迎来参观我们美丽的家乡！

en: You will have a good time here any time in the year!
zh: 一年中的任何时候你都会在这里玩得很开心！

en: China is a big country.
zh: 中国是一个大国。

en: The north and the south of China are very different.
zh: 中国的北方和南方非常不同。

en: In the north, it is very cold in winter.
zh: 在北方，冬天非常寒冷。

en: People can play winter sports like skiing.
zh: 人们可以进行像滑雪这样的冬季运动。

en: There are some mountains in the north, but most of them are not very high.
zh: 北方有一些山，但大多数山都不是很高。

en: People there like to eat noodles and dumplings.
zh: 那里的人们喜欢吃面条和饺子。

en: In the south, it is warm in winter.
zh: 在南方，冬天很暖和。

en: There are many big rivers and it rains a lot.
zh: 有许多大河，而且经常下雨。

en: The mountains in the south are very high.
zh: 南方的山非常高。

en: People grow vegetables all year long, and their main food is rice.
zh: 人们全年都种植蔬菜，他们的主食是米饭。

en: Mountains make up a big part of nature.
zh: 山脉构成了自然界的很大一部分。

en: We can see mountains all over the world.
zh: 我们可以在世界各地看到山脉。

en: Many people like to climb mountains because mountain-climbing can keep them healthy.
zh: 许多人喜欢爬山，因为爬山可以保持健康。

en: We can also do many fun things in mountains, like hiking and picnicking.
zh: 我们还可以在山里做许多有趣的事情，比如徒步旅行和野餐。

en: But we cannot make any fire in mountains.
zh: 但我们不能在山上生火。

en: There are also many mountains under the sea, but we cannot see them.
zh: 海底也有很多山脉，但我们看不到它们。

en: Jane: Hello, Lulu. Can you go swimming with me?
zh: 简：你好，露露。你能和我一起去游泳吗？

en: Lulu: I’m sorry, I can’t. I’m busy now.
zh: 露露：对不起，我不能。我现在很忙。

en: Jane: What are you doing?
zh: 简：你在做什么？

en: Lulu: I’m buying some flowers for Tomb-sweeping Day.
zh: 露露：我正在为清明节买一些花。

en: Jane: Tomb-sweeping Day? Is it a festival?
zh: 简：清明节？它是一个节日吗？

en: Lulu: Yes, it is an important festival in China.
zh: 露露：是的，它是中国一个重要的节日。

en: Every year, in April, we visit the tombs of our late family members.
zh: 每年四月，我们会去祭拜已故家人的坟墓。

en: Jane: What do you do there?
zh: 简：你们在那里做什么？

en: Lulu: We tidy up the tombs and put some flowers there.
zh: 露露：我们整理坟墓并在那里放一些花。

en: Jane: I see. It is a festival to remember your late family members.
zh: 简：我明白了。这是一个纪念你们已故家人的节日。

en: Lulu: Yes. We also call it the Qingming Festival.
zh: 露露：是的。我们也称它为清明节。

en: During this festival, we also go on family hiking and enjoy nature together.
zh: 在这个节日期间，我们还会进行家庭远足，一起享受大自然。

en: Jane: Thank you for telling me so much about this festival.
zh: 简：谢谢你告诉我这么多关于这个节日的事情。

en: Christmas is a big festival in America.
zh: 圣诞节是美国的一个盛大节日。

en: Every year, Michael’s parents buy a Christmas tree.
zh: 每年，迈克尔的父母都会买一棵圣诞树。

en: They first put colorful lights and paper on the tree and make it very pretty.
zh: 他们首先把彩灯和彩纸挂在树上，让它变得非常漂亮。

en: And then, they put the presents under the tree.
zh: 然后，他们把礼物放在树下。

en: At Christmas, they have a big dinner and give presents to each other.
zh: 在圣诞节，他们会吃一顿丰盛的晚餐并互赠礼物。

en: The students are learning something about New Year’s Day.
zh: 学生们正在学习一些关于元旦的知识。

en: Lingling and Jane are making cards for their friends.
zh: 玲玲和简正在为她们的朋友制作卡片。

en: They give the cards to their friends on New Year’s Day.
zh: 她们在元旦那天把卡片送给她们的朋友。

en: Plot is the order of a story.
zh: 情节是故事发展的顺序。

en: It tells the beginning, the middle and the end of the story.
zh: 它讲述了故事的开端、发展和结局。

en: Confucius is a great thinker and teacher in Chinese history.
zh: 孔子是中国历史上一位伟大的思想家和教师。

en: As a thinker, his words teach people how to look at the world.
zh: 作为思想家，他的言论教导人们如何看待世界。

en: As a teacher, he teaches his students how to think and what to be.
zh: 作为教师，他教导学生如何思考以及成为什么样的人。

en: Many of his students are great thinkers and teachers, too.
zh: 他的许多学生也是伟大的思想家和教师。

en: Connections between what you read and what you know can help you understand the text better and remember it well.
zh: 将阅读内容与你已知的事物联系起来，可以帮助你更好地理解文本并牢固记忆。

en: September 10th is Teachers’ Day in China.
zh: 9月10日是中国的教师节。

en: On this day, students thank their teachers in many ways.
zh: 在这一天，学生们以多种方式感谢他们的老师。

en: They write “Thank you, teacher!” on the blackboard or make a thank-you card for their teachers.
zh: 他们在黑板上写下“谢谢您，老师！”或者为老师制作一张感谢卡。

en: Sometimes they sing songs for their teachers and give best wishes to them.
zh: 有时他们为老师唱歌，并向他们致以最美好的祝愿。

en: Our teachers love us all, so each of us should thank them.
zh: 我们的老师爱我们所有人，所以我们每个人都应该感谢他们。

en: It’s the last day of the Chinese lunar year, and we are having celebrations to welcome the Spring Festival.
zh: 这是中国农历年的最后一天，我们正在举行庆祝活动来迎接春节。

en: Look, my father is putting up the Spring Festival couplets.
zh: 看，我父亲正在贴春联。

en: And here in the kitchen, my mother is making some delicious dishes with my aunts.
zh: 在厨房里，我母亲正和我的阿姨们一起制作一些美味的菜肴。

en: Now, it’s time for dinner.
zh: 现在，是晚餐时间了。

en: We are having a big meal.
zh: 我们正在享用一顿大餐。

en: Everybody is eating and drinking happily.
zh: 每个人都在愉快地吃喝。

en: And at the table, my grandparents give some lucky money to my young cousins and me.
zh: 在餐桌旁，我的祖父母给我和我年幼的表兄弟姐妹们一些压岁钱。

en: Finally, here comes the TV show for the Spring Festival!
zh: 最后，春节电视节目开始了！

en: All the Chinese around the world watch the show and welcome the Chinese New Year together.
zh: 全世界所有的中国人一起观看这个节目，迎接中国新年。

en: We all enjoy the family time and are excited to spend the Spring Festival holiday together.
zh: 我们都享受家庭时光，并为能一起度过春节假期而感到兴奋。

en: Teachers’ Day is on September 10th.
zh: 教师节在9月10日。

en: About one hundred people are taking part in the dragon boat race.
zh: 大约一百人正在参加龙舟比赛。

en: This is my thirteenth birthday.
zh: 这是我的第十三个生日。

en: Do you like eating dumplings?
zh: 你喜欢吃饺子吗？

en: Yes, I do. And I am learning how to make dumplings these days.
zh: 是的，我喜欢。而且这些天我正在学习如何包饺子。

en: What do your family do at the Spring Festival?
zh: 你的家人在春节做什么？

en: We always make dumplings and watch TV shows.
zh: 我们总是包饺子和看电视节目。

en: At the Mid-Autumn Festival, my family eat mooncakes to celebrate it.
zh: 在中秋节，我的家人吃月饼来庆祝。

en: At night, we also have a big dinner together.
zh: 晚上，我们还会一起吃一顿丰盛的晚餐。

en: We eat delicious food and have some drinks.
zh: 我们吃美味的食物，喝一些饮料。

en: And then we enjoy the moon and talk with each other.
zh: 然后我们赏月，互相聊天。

en: My father lights the lanterns and hangs them in trees.
zh: 我的父亲点亮灯笼并把它们挂在树上。

en: We enjoy the beautiful night very much.
zh: 我们非常享受这个美丽的夜晚。

en: The Lantern Festival falls on the last day of the Chinese New Year.
zh: 元宵节在中国新年的最后一天。

en: It is an important day for Chinese.
zh: 对中国人来说这是一个重要的日子。

en: Family members often get together on that day.
zh: 家人通常在那天聚在一起。

en: Every year, we all have great fun on that day.
zh: 每年，我们都在那天玩得很开心。

en: First, in the morning, we prepare for the celebrations.
zh: 首先，在早上，我们为庆祝活动做准备。

en: My father hangs red lanterns.
zh: 我父亲挂红灯笼。

en: We all like red because it is a lucky color.
zh: 我们都喜欢红色，因为它是一个幸运的颜色。

en: And then, we have a big meal and my mother cooks some really delicious tangyuan.
zh: 然后，我们吃一顿大餐，我妈妈会煮一些非常美味的汤圆。

en: At night, my sister and I guess the lantern riddles with our grandparents.
zh: 晚上，我和姐姐与我们的祖父母一起猜灯谜。

en: I love the Chinese Lantern Festival.
zh: 我喜爱中国元宵节。

en: It is so much fun!
zh: 它非常有趣！

en: In Madrid, Spain, people begin New Year’s Day celebrations on the night of December 31st.
zh: 在西班牙马德里，人们在12月31日晚上开始庆祝新年。

en: They take part in many activities to welcome the new year.
zh: 他们参加许多活动来迎接新年。

en: People usually have a big dinner with their family on that day.
zh: 人们通常在那天与家人共进丰盛的晚餐。

en: After dinner, lots of people go to the street and have different celebrations.
zh: 晚餐后，许多人走上街头，进行各种庆祝活动。

en: At midnight, the bells of Puerta del Sol ring together twelve times and people eat twelve grapes and then say “happy new year” to each other.
zh: 午夜时分，太阳门的钟声一起敲响十二次，人们吃下十二颗葡萄，然后互相说“新年快乐”。

en: In doing so, people hope they will have good luck in every month of the coming new year.
zh: 通过这样做，人们希望他们在即将到来的新年的每个月都有好运。

en: Lingling: Mom, you are making Chongyang cakes. How nice!
zh: 玲玲：妈妈，你在做重阳糕。真好啊！

en: Mom: Yes. Today is the Double Ninth Festival.
zh: 妈妈：是的。今天是重阳节。

en: We’re going for hiking with the cakes.
zh: 我们要带着这些糕去徒步。

en: Lingling: I know the festival falls on the ninth day of the ninth month in the lunar calendar.
zh: 玲玲：我知道这个节日是在农历九月初九。

en: It is a festival for old people.
zh: 它是一个为老人设立的节日。

en: Grandfather and grandmother are so happy.
zh: 爷爷和奶奶会非常高兴。

en: Mom: I am also very happy.
zh: 妈妈：我也很高兴。

en: Your father does not have to work today.
zh: 你爸爸今天不用工作。

en: He can go hiking with us too.
zh: 他也可以和我们一起去徒步。

en: He works in a high school.
zh: 他在一所高中工作。

en: What other things do you know about Lin Hua’s family?
zh: 你还知道关于林华家人的其他事吗？

en: I like basketball, but I can’t play it well.
zh: 我喜欢篮球，但我打得不好。

en: I am Kangkang and I’m from Beijing.
zh: 我是康康，我来自北京。

en: Chen Wen often goes to Beijing by plane/train.
zh: 陈雯经常乘飞机/火车去北京。

en: I like Chinese. How/What about you?
zh: 我喜欢汉语。你呢？

en: Xiao Ming is new here. He has no friends at school.
zh: 肖明是新来的。他在学校里没有朋友。

en: She joined the company three months ago.
zh: 她三个月前进了这家公司。

en: —What’s the weather like in autumn?
zh: 秋天的天气怎么样？

en: —What’s the weather like in spring in Beijing?
zh: 北京春天的天气怎么样？

en: And I’m not really good at playing football.
zh: 而且我不是很擅长踢足球。

en: Hi, I’m Kangkang. What’s your name?
zh: 嗨，我是康康。你叫什么名字？

en: My name is Zhao Lin.
zh: 我的名字是赵林。

en: Hello, I’m Li Ming. I’m from Beijing. I’m in Class 6, Grade 7. Which class are you in?
zh: 你好，我是李明。我来自北京。我在七年级六班。你在哪个班？

en: Hello, I’m Meimei, and I’m in Class 7. I’m from Tianjin.
zh: 你好，我是梅梅，我在七班。我来自天津。

en: I’m 13 years old. What about you, Meimei?
zh: 我13岁。你呢，梅梅？

en: I’m 12 years old. I like cooking. What do you like?
zh: 我12岁。我喜欢烹饪。你喜欢什么？

en: I like swimming. Meimei, who is the boy over there?
zh: 我喜欢游泳。梅梅，那边的男孩是谁？

en: He is my friend, Lin Hua. He is 13 years old. He’s from Wuhan.
zh: 他是我的朋友，林华。他13岁。他来自武汉。

en: Which class is he in?
zh: 他在哪个班？

en: He is in Class 3.
zh: 他在三班。

en: Here is a photo of my new friends and me.
zh: 这是我和我的新朋友们的照片。

en: This boy is Yang Guang. He is from Beijing. He likes reading.
zh: 这个男孩是杨光。他来自北京。他喜欢阅读。

en: This girl is Chen Lili. She is from Shanghai. She likes hiking.
zh: 这个女孩是陈丽丽。她来自上海。她喜欢徒步旅行。

en: This boy is Xiao Ming. He is from Tianjin. He likes playing football.
zh: 这个男孩是小明。他来自天津。他喜欢踢足球。

en: This girl is me. My name is Xiaoxiao. I’m from Beijing. I like drawing.
zh: 这个女孩是我。我的名字是笑笑。我来自北京。我喜欢画画。

en: Kangkang: Wang Junfeng, is this a photo of your family?
zh: 康康：王俊峰，这是你的全家福吗？

en: Wang Junfeng: Yes, it is.
zh: 王俊峰：是的，它是。

en: Kangkang: Is your mother a nurse?
zh: 康康：你的妈妈是护士吗？

en: Wang Junfeng: No, she isn’t. She is a doctor, but my aunt is a nurse.
zh: 王俊峰：不，她不是。她是一名医生，但我的姑姑是一名护士。

en: Kangkang: Great. What does your father do?
zh: 康康：太好了。你的爸爸是做什么的？

en: Wang Junfeng: He is a worker in a factory.
zh: 王俊峰：他是一名工厂的工人。

en: Kangkang: Who is that man?
zh: 康康：那个男人是谁？

en: Wang Junfeng: He is my uncle. He is a teacher.
zh: 王俊峰：他是我的叔叔。他是一名教师。

en: Lingling: Li Xiang, this is my family photo.
zh: 玲玲：李响，这是我的全家福。

en: Li Xiang: What does your father do, Lingling?
zh: 李响：你的爸爸是做什么的，玲玲？

en: Lingling: He is a driver.
zh: 玲玲：他是一名司机。

en: Li Xiang: How about your mother?
zh: 李响：你的妈妈呢？

en: Lingling: She is a policewoman.
zh: 玲玲：她是一名女警察。

en: Li Xiang: Do you often help your parents do chores?
zh: 李响：你经常帮你的父母做家务吗？

en: Lingling: Yes, we do. I often help my father do the cooking. My brother usually helps my mother clean up.
zh: 玲玲：是的，我们做。我经常帮我爸爸做饭。我哥哥通常帮我妈妈打扫卫生。

en: Li Xiang: What do you do on weekends?
zh: 李响：你们周末做什么？

en: Lingling: We visit our grandparents. We eat and talk together.
zh: 玲玲：我们去探望我们的祖父母。我们一起吃饭和聊天。

en: I have four cousins. They work in different cities. Li Jun works in Beijing as a cook. Wang Jing works in Fuzhou, and she is a doctor. Zhang Tao drives a bus in Shenzhen. Wang Linlin teaches English in a high school in Nanjing. She is a very good teacher.
zh: 我有四个堂兄弟姐妹。他们在不同的城市工作。李军在北京当厨师。王静在福州工作，她是一名医生。张涛在深圳开公交车。王林林在南京的一所高中教英语。她是一位非常好的老师。

en: Kangkang: Xiao Ya, what time is it now?
zh: 康康：小雅，现在几点了？

en: Xiao Ya: It’s ten twenty. I have a biology class at ten thirty. It’s my favorite subject. What about you?
zh: 小雅：十点二十了。我十点半有生物课。这是我最喜欢的科目。你呢？

en: Kangkang: I like history best.
zh: 康康：我最喜欢历史。

en: When do you have the history class?
zh: 你什么时候上历史课？

en: It’s at half past two on Thursday afternoon.
zh: 星期四下午两点半。

en: I can’t find my schoolbag. It’s yellow.
zh: 我找不到我的书包了。它是黄色的。

en: I see. What’s your name, please?
zh: 我明白了。请问你叫什么名字？

en: My name is Zhou Hua. My name card is in the schoolbag. You can see my name on it.
zh: 我叫周华。我的名片在书包里。你可以在上面看到我的名字。

en: What other things are there in your schoolbag?
zh: 你的书包里还有什么其他东西？

en: There is a ping-pong ball in it. Mmm ... There are also two books, a math book and a science book.
zh: 里面有一个乒乓球。嗯……还有两本书，一本数学书和一本科学书。

en: Let me have a look in my office.
zh: 让我在我的办公室看看。

en: This is your schoolbag. I find it next to the computer.
zh: 这是你的书包。我在电脑旁边找到的。

en: Hi, Lingling, what club are you in?
zh: 嗨，玲玲，你在哪个俱乐部？

en: I’m in the Art Club.
zh: 我在艺术俱乐部。

en: How often do you go to the club?
zh: 你多久去一次俱乐部？

en: Every Friday, at three thirty-five in the afternoon.
zh: 每个星期五，下午三点三十五分。

en: It’s OK. I’m in the PE Club.
zh: 没关系。我在体育俱乐部。

en: How often do you go there?
zh: 你多久去那里一次？

en: At four o’clock every Tuesday afternoon.
zh: 每个星期二下午四点。

en: What’s your favorite sport in your club?
zh: 你在俱乐部最喜欢的运动是什么？

en: Basketball. What’s your favorite, Lingling?
zh: 篮球。玲玲，你最喜欢什么？

en: Which season do you like best, Miss Wang?
zh: 王老师，你最喜欢哪个季节？

en: Because I can go swimming in summer.
zh: 因为夏天我可以去游泳。

en: What’s the weather like in summer in Canada?
zh: 加拿大夏天的天气怎么样？

en: It is hot. Sometimes it rains.
zh: 天气很热。有时会下雨。

en: Look! There are many old people doing Tai Chi in the park.
zh: 看！公园里有很多老人在打太极。

en: It’s a very good exercise.
zh: 这是一项非常好的运动。

en: Are you good at playing Tai Chi?
zh: 你擅长打太极拳吗？

en: But my grandfather does it well.
zh: 但我爷爷打得很好。

en: Does he do Tai Chi every day?
zh: 他每天都打太极拳吗？

en: He does Tai Chi with his friends every morning.
zh: 他每天早上都和朋友们一起打太极拳。

en: It’s so cold in winter, but they are doing it outdoors.
zh: 冬天很冷，但他们却在户外打拳。

en: They do it in all seasons.
zh: 他们一年四季都打。

en: It helps them keep healthy.
zh: 这有助于他们保持健康。

en: We can see trees everywhere.
zh: 我们到处都能看到树。

en: And they are important for people and animals.
zh: 它们对人和动物都很重要。

en: What do you think of trees, Kangkang?
zh: 康康，你觉得树怎么样？

en: Trees can bring us clean air.
zh: 树木能给我们带来清洁的空气。

en: With no air, people and animals can’t live.
zh: 没有空气，人和动物就无法生存。

en: Trees can give home to many wild animals.
zh: 树木能为许多野生动物提供家园。

en: Some wild animals can live in the trees and eat the fruit of the trees.
zh: 一些野生动物可以住在树上，吃树的果实。

en: Em ... People also need trees for many things in their life.
zh: 嗯……人们在生活中也需要树木来做很多事情。

en: People can use trees to make tables, chairs and paper.
zh: 人们可以用树木来制作桌子、椅子和纸张。

en: Trees are useful to all of us.
zh: 树木对我们所有人都很有用。

en: And don’t forget we can also have a good rest under a tree in summer.
zh: 别忘了，夏天我们还可以在树下好好休息。

en: so it’s very cold and windy here.
zh: 所以这里非常寒冷且多风。

en: The second picture is also about a kind of highland.
zh: 第二张图片也是关于一种高地。

en: We can see a forest of stones in it.
zh: 我们可以在其中看到一片石林。

en: The stone forest also stands on a highland.
zh: 石林也矗立在一片高地上。

en: Oh, here in the third picture is a grassland.
zh: 哦，第三张图片里是一片草原。

en: It’s also on a highland.
zh: 它也在高地上。

en: There are many cows and sheep here.
zh: 这里有许多牛和羊。

en: The highland in the last picture is a little different.
zh: 最后一张图片中的高地有点不同。

en: The earth is yellow, and it is very dry.
zh: 土地是黄色的，并且非常干燥。

en: The wind takes away much earth from the highland every year.
zh: 风每年都会从高地上带走许多土壤。

en: May 1st is Labor Day.
zh: 五月一日是劳动节。

en: It is a holiday for workers in the world.
zh: 它是全世界劳动者的一个假日。

en: On this day, most people like to go traveling with their family and friends, and some people just like to stay at home and enjoy the free time.
zh: 在这一天，大多数人喜欢与家人和朋友一起去旅行，而有些人则喜欢待在家里享受空闲时光。

en: Kangkang, why are there so many national flags on the streets?
zh: 康康，为什么街上有这么多国旗？

en: You know, today is October 1st.
zh: 你知道，今天是十月一日。

en: You put the flags on the streets to celebrate the big day.
zh: 你们把国旗挂在街上来庆祝这个重要的日子。

en: People also raise the national flag at Tian’anmen Square.
zh: 人们也会在天安门广场升起国旗。

en: I’m sure a lot of people like to watch this at Tian’anmen.
zh: 我肯定很多人都喜欢在天安门观看这个。

en: People also watch this on TV all over the country.
zh: 全国各地的人们也会在电视上观看这个。

en: Some people are putting flowers on the sides of streets.
zh: 有些人正在街道两旁摆放鲜花。

en: The flowers make the streets so beautiful!
zh: 鲜花让街道变得如此美丽！

en: Everybody is happy to see the flowers on National Day.
zh: 每个人在国庆节看到鲜花都很高兴。

en: Let’s talk about some festivals in the world.
zh: 让我们谈谈世界上的一些节日。

en: In February, people in New Zealand have an important festival, their National Day.
zh: 在二月，新西兰人有一个重要的节日，他们的国庆节。

en: There are many activities, such as boat games and music shows.
zh: 有许多活动，例如划船比赛和音乐表演。

en: In March, Russia has an interesting festival.
zh: 在三月，俄罗斯有一个有趣的节日。

en: People there make many pancakes at home and then celebrate the festival on the streets.
zh: 那里的人们在家里做许多薄煎饼，然后在街上庆祝这个节日。

en: On May 1st, people in France give their friends a kind of small and white flowers.
zh: 在五月一日，法国人会送给他们的朋友一种白色的小花。

en: People believe the flowers can bring them luck and love.
zh: 人们相信这些花能给他们带来好运和爱情。

en: A phoneme is the smallest unit of sound.
zh: 音素是最小的语音单位。

en: There are two types of phonemes in English: vowels and consonants, with a total of 48 phonemes, including 20 vowels and 28 consonants.
zh: 英语音素有元音和辅音两种，共有48个音素，其中元音20个，辅音28个。

en: A syllable is composed of phonemes.
zh: 音节由音素组成。

en: Vowels are the main components of syllables.
zh: 元音是构成音节的主体。

en: In English, a syllable can consist of only one vowel, such as /aI/; or it can consist of one vowel and several consonants, such as /mi:/, /æm/, and /teIk/.
zh: 英语中一个音节可以只由一个元音构成，如 /aI/；也可以由一个元音和若干个辅音构成，如/mi:/、/æm/ 和/teIk/ 等。

en: Generally, one vowel can form a syllable, but the more sonorous consonants /l/, /m/, /n/ can form a syllable with the preceding consonant when there is no vowel following, known as a syllabic consonant, such as /pl/ in apple and /sn/ in lesson.
zh: 一般来说，一个元音可以构成一个音节，但较响亮的辅音/l/、/m/、/n/ 在后面没有元音时，与它前面的辅音也可以构成一个音节，称为成节音，如apple 中的/pl/ 和lesson 中的/sn/。

en: Syllables can be divided into open syllables and closed syllables.
zh: 音节有开音节和闭音节之分。

en: An open syllable is a stressed syllable ending with a pronounced vowel letter, such as no and she; or a stressed syllable ending with 'a vowel letter + a consonant letter (except r) + a silent e', such as name and like.
zh: 开音节是以发音的元音字母结尾的重读音节，如no、she；或是以“元音字母 + 辅音字母（r 除外） + 不发音的ｅ”结尾的重读音节，如name、like。

en: A closed syllable refers to a stressed syllable ending with a consonant letter (except r).
zh: 闭音节指的是以辅音字母结尾的重读音节（r 除外）。

en: The pronunciation of the five vowel letters in open and closed syllables is shown in the table below:
zh: 五个元音字母在开音节和闭音节中的发音如下表所示：
